name: Feverfew
summary: feverfew is tracked for inflammation,pain with conservative evidence framing. Keep claims tied to source-backed preparation and safety context.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
interactions: May increase bleeding risk with anticoagulants/antiplatelets/NSAIDs

sources.title: Nutraceuticals and Headache 2024: Riboflavin, Coenzyme Q10, Feverfew, Magnesium, Melatonin, and Butterbur
